targets.ownLabel: Close dialog Session expired Please log in again. The login page will open in a new tab. After logging in you can close it and return to this page.
Close dialog Session expired Please log in again. The login page will open in a new tab. After logging in you can close it and return to this page.

All Addons Entry Automation New With the WPForms Entry Automation addon, you can set your form entries to be automatically exported on a daily, weekly, or regular basis of your choice. Deactivated Install Addon Make New With the WPForms Make addon, you can connect your forms to multiple apps and services, enabling powerful automations to simplify workflows, manage data, and save time. Deactivated Install Addon n8n New Turn each form submission into an automated workflow with the WPForms n8n addon. Send data straight to n8n and let your forms handle the busywork for you. Deactivated Install Addon Notion New The Notion addon transforms each form submission into a new Notion page, organized exactly how you need it. Map your fields once and let WPForms keep your workspace up to date automatically. Settings Deactivated Install Addon PDF New Use the WPForms PDF addon to save your email notification entries to a PDF file, complete with your logo and advanced customization options too. Deactivated Install Addon Quiz New Build engaging graded, personality, or weighted quizzes that capture leads and assess knowledge. AI-powered generation creates complete quizzes in seconds. Deactivated Install Addon Zoho CRM New Create and update your Zoho CRM contacts, leads, and more, automatically from your WPForms submissions. Filter with field mapping and conditional logic, too. Settings Deactivated Install Addon User Journey Featured Discover the steps your visitors take before they submit your forms. Right in the WordPress dashboard, you can easily see the content that’s driving the most valuable form conversions. Deactivated Install Addon ActiveCampaign The WPForms ActiveCampaign addon lets you add contacts to your account, record events, add notes to contacts, and more. Settings Deactivated Install Addon Authorize.Net The WPForms Authorize.Net addon allows you to connect your WordPress site with Authorize.Net to easily collect payments, donations, and online orders. Settings Deactivated Install Addon AWeber The WPForms AWeber addon allows you to create AWeber newsletter signup forms in WordPress, so you can grow your email list. Settings Deactivated Install Addon Brevo The WPForms Brevo addon helps you organize your leads, automate your marketing, and engage your subscribers. Settings Deactivated Install Addon Campaign Monitor The WPForms Campaign Monitor addon allows you to create Campaign Monitor newsletter signup forms in WordPress, so you can grow your email list. Settings Deactivated Install Addon Conversational Forms Want to improve your form completion rate? Conversational Forms addon by WPForms helps make your web forms feel more human, so you can improve your conversions. Interactive web forms made easy. Deactivated Install Addon Drip The WPForms Drip addon allows you to create Drip newsletter signup forms in WordPress, so you can grow your email list. Settings Deactivated Install Addon Form Abandonment Unlock more leads by capturing partial entries from your forms. Easily follow up with interested leads and turn them into loyal customers. Deactivated Install Addon Form Locker The WPForms Form Locker addon allows you to lock your WordPress forms with various permissions and access control rules including passwords, members-only, specific date / time, max entry limit, and more. Deactivated Install Addon Form Pages Want to improve your form conversions? WPForms Form Pages addon allows you to create completely custom "distraction-free" form landing pages to boost conversions (without writing any code). Deactivated Install Addon GetResponse The WPForms GetResponse addon allows you to create GetResponse newsletter signup forms in WordPress, so you can grow your email list. Settings Deactivated Install Addon HubSpot The WPForms HubSpot addon lets you send leads from WordPress directly to your HubSpot CRM. Settings Deactivated Install Addon Kit The WPForms Kit addon lets you collect subscribers to grow your mailing list, automate email marketing, and connect with your audience. Settings Deactivated Install Addon Lead Forms Want to increase conversions and generate leads for your business? The WPForms Lead Forms Addon lets you embed beautiful forms that show one question at a time. Deactivated Install Addon Mailchimp The WPForms Mailchimp addon allows you to create Mailchimp newsletter signup forms in WordPress, so you can grow your email list. Settings Deactivated Install Addon MailerLite The WPForms MailerLite addon makes it easy to send contacts from your WordPress forms to your MailerLite Groups. Settings Deactivated Install Addon MailPoet The WPForms MailPoet addon allows you to integrate email marketing forms with WordPress, enabling you to create subscription forms, manage subscribers, and grow your mailing list. Settings Deactivated Install Addon Offline Forms Never lose leads or data again. Offline Forms addon allows your users to save their entered data offline and submit when their internet connection is restored. Deactivated Install Addon PayPal Standard The WPForms PayPal Standard addon allows you to connect your WordPress site with PayPal to easily collect payments, donations, and online orders. Deactivated Install Addon Pipedrive The WPForms Pipedrive addon allows you to automate tasks through the Pipedrive CRM to nurture leads, discover insights, and more. Settings Deactivated Install Addon Post Submissions The WPForms Post Submissions addon makes it easy to have user-submitted content in WordPress. This front-end post submission form allow your users to submit blog posts without logging into the admin area. Deactivated Install Addon Salesforce The WPForms Salesforce addon allows you to easily send your WordPress form contacts and leads to your Salesforce CRM account. Settings Deactivated Install Addon Save and Resume The WPForms Save and Resume addon allows your visitors to save their progress while filling in your forms. When they're ready to continue, they can restore their entry with a click. Deactivated Install Addon Slack The WPForms Slack addon allows you to send direct messages, channel messages, and reminders to a Slack workspace. Settings Deactivated Install Addon Twilio The WPForms Twilio addon lets you easily send confirmations to customers via SMS or WhatsApp upon form submission. Settings Deactivated Install Addon User Registration The WPForms User Registration addon lets you create custom user registration, password reset, and login forms for your website. Deactivated Install Addon Webhooks The WPForms Webhooks addon allows you to send form entry data to secondary tools and external services. No code required, and no need for a third party connector. Deactivated Install Addon Zapier The WPForms Zapier addon allows you to connect your WordPress forms with over 9,000+ web apps. The integration possibilities here are just endless. Settings Deactivated Install Addon

Activated Addons Airtable New The Airtable addon turns each form submission into a neatly organized record. Send data straight to your bases and keep everything updated automatically. Settings Activated Calculations Featured WPForms Calculations addon lets you create custom calculations for shipping, quotes, lead magnets, and more. Get more sales and leads. Activated Coupons The WPForms Coupons addon makes it easy to drive more sales by offering coupon discounts. Settings Activated Dropbox New The WPForms Dropbox addon lets you receive user-submitted files directly to your Dropbox account to help you streamline your file management. Settings Activated Geolocation Featured The WPForms Geolocation addon allows you to store your visitors' geolocation data with their form submission. You can also turn on address autocomplete to make forms easier to fill out. Settings Activated Google Calendar New The Google Calendar Addon for WPForms allows you to send form submissions and create events in your linked Google calendars at regularly scheduled intervals selected by you. Settings Activated Google Drive New The WPForms Google Drive addon allows you to automatically filter and export form entries and file uploads to your Google Drive. Settings Activated Google Sheets Featured The WPForms Google Sheets addon makes it easy to send form entries and leads to a Google Sheet. Settings Activated PayPal Commerce Pro Recommended The WPForms PayPal Commerce Pro addon makes it easy to accept PayPal and credit card payments on your WordPress site. Quickly set it up with a few clicks. Settings Activated Signature The WPForms Signature addon makes it easy for users to sign your forms. This WordPress signature plugin will allow your users to sign contracts and other agreements with their mouse or touch screen. Activated Square Pro The WPForms Square addon allows you to connect your WordPress site with Square to easily collect payments, donations, and online orders. Settings Activated Stripe Pro Recommended The Stripe Pro addon grants access to conditional logic for payments and lower transaction fees. Use it alongside our core Stripe integration to easily collect payments, donations, and online orders. Settings Activated Surveys and Polls Featured The WPForms Survey Addon allows you to add interactive polls and survey forms to your WordPress site. It comes with best-in-class reporting to help you make data-driven decisions. Activated
